reviews.review_description:
What is wrong with this game? Will not install on my Note7!! Did I get ripped off? 

:(
Have to use trackpad  Fun for two minutes. Shame because game looks beautifull.
Bought this yesterday and even though I have nearly 4 gb of free space on my s6 edge the game constantly says that "Hitman go couldn't be installed", I want my money back, don't buy this broken sh*t.
The game is beautiful. Graphic is smooth and the puzzle is challenging.

Brand new S7 Edge (hour old, no apps installed yet aside from Oculus), bought this for $15 and used 2.5 GB in many download attempts costing $55, FAILS EVERY TIME! - seriously guys, im developer, you should be so embarrassed by this.
Very good. I really would love to zoom in and see more details. This feature could make your game one of the best in the store!

reviews.review_title: This game is a HIT MAN GO get it
reviews.review_description: Love the gameboard that you can move around and get different perspectives on each level. Great game!

One of the best games for the Gear VR, IMO. Stunning graphics, great atmospheric sounds and a good number of reasonably challenging puzzles. This one can entertain you for quite some time. Worked just fine on an S7, with only a few dropped frames now and then. Only complaint is that it doesn't explores well the possibilities of VR - it would be nice to be able to change the camera into 1st or 3rd person modes, for instance.

Not only will it still not install but I go to see to the details and it crashes! I wonder if that's to keep others from seeing the horrible reviews? Also still no comment,  patch or apology from creators or oculus on this defected game that we paid money for! :-/
Got the game today, great graphics and game play. Very addictive once you get into the game. Hope to see more games of this quality.
Great game fun and you have to think well done developers
Cant install or even download

I have plenty of space on my phone. 
I bought this as part of a bundle. I would like it to work.
Or... i would like store credit to spend on something that does work.
Please fix

Works with S7 Edge and Bluetooth headphones with no issues. Moving the board closer helps initial blur a lot. Nice frame rate and view angle for setting your board related attacks. It does give a sinking feeling playing for a bit though but may just be me. Can see a lot of potential for really getting inveloped into this game

Amazing game. Hats to picture what vr would add. But it's awesome. No problems with the Moga hero power controller. Rotate. Zoom. Move agent all worth the pad.  140 levels. So worth the money. Any God perspective game where you're looking down like this is great on vr. Like a gameboard laid out in front of you. Well done. Must buy like minecraft. Another great game for gearvr. Never played hitman but love it.
Yeah, how about you give me my money back.
This game wants permission to view all my photo's on my device. The programmers also want to see more private information on my phone. WTH?!?
Really like this game in vr it feels like you are hod of the board!! please please please do Tomb Raider Go!!@

reviews.review_title: Why are you putting a game that doesn't
reviews.review_description: work on sale? It refuses to install and I cleared space for it. Wtf? Do they know when this problem is going to clear up and how long do I have to get a refund if it doesnt?
